ch12_start.text: When you return to the upper hub, you find that Maya has gone missing. Her rationing bar wrapper is torn on the floor, leading a trail into the dark, abandoned crew quarters.

choices.text: Follow the trail into the dark quarters.

ch12_trail.text: The quarters are pitch black, illuminated only by patches of bioluminescent spores. You track small footprints through the glowing dust. You find Maya curled up in a corner, clutching a torn photograph of a young drill worker.

ch12_maya_truth.text: She looks up, her eyes wide with guilt. 'I'm sorry. I just wanted to find my brother. He was on the drill team. I sneaked down to the cavern two days ago to see him...'
ch12_maya_truth.speaker: Maya

choices.text: 'You went down there? Before the breach?'

ch12_maya_spores.text: 'I stepped in the glowing mud,' she cries. 'I tracked it back into the vents. I didn't know it was alive! I'm the one who brought the monsters in!' The outbreak was a tragic accident caused by a child looking for her family.
ch12_maya_spores.speaker: Maya

choices.text: Comfort her. 'It's not your fault, Maya.'
Look at her in horrified silence.

ch12_end.text: There's no time to dwell on the past. The station shudders violently. The upper pressure bulkheads are failing. You need to access the Command Center and find out if Corporate is sending help.
